prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the BEGINNING of "Item 1A. Risk Factors".
Find the "Item 1A" heading, then transcribe VERBATIM the first 5 lines of text that come immediately after it. Include any report title, addressee, or sub-heading exactly as printed — do NOT skip them; only ignore page running-headers, page numbers, and footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
An investment in our shares of common stocks involves a high degree of risk. You should carefully consider the following risk factors, together with the
other information contained in this Report, before you decide to buy any of our securities. Any of the following risks could cause our business, results
of operations or financial condition to suffer materially, causing the market price of our shares of common stock to decline, or in extreme cases we may
lose part or all of your investment in our shares of common stock. Additional risks and uncertainties not currently known to us or that we currently do
not deem material may also have a material adverse effect on our business, financial condition or operations that materially and adversely affect our wealth.
